description: Legal document. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Monday, 1 Kislev 1632 Seleucid (=[...] 720 AH), which is November 1320 CE. Damaged & faded. Perhaps a settlement of a dispute. Mentions "the meat" and "any more than 10 dirhams nuqra." The scribe's name is M[...] b. Y[...]. There do not appear to be any witness signatures.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-14. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
